rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MARYANN ARTS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Joinder In Defendant Owens-Illinois, Inc.S Motion To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 24, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANTS SEARS, ROEBUCK & CO., WESTERN AUTO SUPPLY COMPANY Defendants Joinder In Defendant Owens-Illinois, Inc.S Motion To Dismiss. The motion of Owens-Illinois and all joinders thereto for discretionary dismissal of the wrongful death and children¿s los of consortium claims are denied in the exercise of the court¿s discretion based on the lack of prejudice to defendants and plaintiffs¿ recent retention of counsel who is able to proceed with those claims. The motion of Owens-Illinois and all joinders thereto for mandatory dismissal of Jerold Arts¿ loss of consortium claim is granted since more than five years have expired and there is no exception to the mandatory five year rule. The motion of Owens-Illinois and all joinders thereto for mandatory dismissal of the survival claim is denied since the five year rule is tolled for the time from decedent¿s death to the filing of that claim. =(302/HEK)
